description: CARC code to denial category mapping. Based on CMS X12 835 CARC definitions.

group_code_descriptions.CO: Contractual Obligation — provider write-off per contract
group_code_descriptions.OA: Other Adjustments — does not fit CO/PR/PI

TIMELY_FILING.action: Write off. Document for upstream timely filing monitoring.

BUNDLING.description: CO-97/4: Service bundled with another procedure. Payer considers it included.
BUNDLING.action: Appeal with modifier -59 (distinct procedure) if documented separately.

PRIOR_AUTH.description: CO-15: Prior authorization required or missing.
PRIOR_AUTH.action: Obtain retroactive authorization or appeal with clinical documentation.

MEDICAL_NECESSITY.description: CO-50/57: Service not medically necessary per payer policy.
MEDICAL_NECESSITY.action: Appeal with clinical notes and supporting diagnosis documentation.

DUPLICATE.action: Verify original claim status. Do not resubmit.

COVERAGE.description: CO-96/27: Service not covered under patient plan.
COVERAGE.action: Bill patient if non-covered service. Verify benefits at eligibility check.

CONTRACTUAL.description: CO-45: Charge exceeds fee schedule/contracted rate. Expected write-off.
CONTRACTUAL.action: Post contractual adjustment. No appeal needed.

TECHNICAL.description: Technical denial — NPI, eligibility, or format error.
TECHNICAL.action: Correct technical error and resubmit. Check Project 1 validation rules.

REVERSAL.description: PR/OA: Previously paid claim reversed or taken back.
REVERSAL.action: Investigate reversal reason. Appeal if unjustified.
